title: xCart Pickup — cartPickupLocations facet Returns term_facets Structure

operations.label: setup_prod
operations.query: query { products(storeId: "B2B-store" currencyCode: "USD" first: 1 filter: "category.subtree:fc596540864a41bf8ab78734ee7353a3 price.USD:(0 TO) inStock_variations:true") { items { id } } }

operations.label: add_item
operations.query: mutation { addItem(command: { storeId: "B2B-store" userId: "user-acme-store-maintainer-1" productId: "8e0eaa82-a744-439c-ac44-7c519e7041f4" quantity: 1 }) { id } }

operations.label: probe_facets

crossLayerChecks.raw: [EVIDENCE] term_facets contains entries for each requested facet (address.countryCode, address.regionName, address.city) when locations exist with those values populated — runner-manual check
crossLayerChecks.note: term_facets contains entries for each requested facet (address.countryCode, address.regionName, address.city) when locations exist with those values populated — runner-manual check
crossLayerChecks.resolved: term_facets contains entries for each requested facet (address.countryCode, address.regionName, address.city) when locations exist with those values populated — runner-manual check

crossLayerChecks.raw: [EVIDENCE] each term_facets entry's terms[].count is a positive integer; sum of counts across a facet ≤ totalCount
crossLayerChecks.note: each term_facets entry's terms[].count is a positive integer; sum of counts across a facet ≤ totalCount
crossLayerChecks.resolved: each term_facets entry's terms[].count is a positive integer; sum of counts across a facet ≤ totalCount

crossLayerChecks.raw: [EVIDENCE] term and label are non-empty strings on each terms[] entry
crossLayerChecks.note: term and label are non-empty strings on each terms[] entry
crossLayerChecks.resolved: term and label are non-empty strings on each terms[] entry
